channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Getting control where we can'—Europe wants sovereign AI but most chips come from the U.S.
item.description: At Fortune Brainstorm Tech, Mistral's Timothée Lacroix argued for European control over the AI stack.

item.title: Should Americans get an equity stake in AI? Trump and progressive Democrats propose public ownership of AI
item.description: In an unusual cross-ideological convergence, Trump and progressive Democrats like Bernie Sanders are both floating some form of public equity in AI.

item.title: A $200 million Boomer estate, millennial heir Nick Reiner, and the dark side of the Great Wealth Transfer
item.description: The fight over a trust offers a grim preview of what happens when the largest inheritance in history meets a family at war.

item.title: Anthropic releases its first Mythos-class model to the public
item.description: Anthropic first announced Mythos in April, calling it a significant leap in capabilities, but chose to tightly control its rollout through an initiative ...
